task_completion.description: Verify the agent opens and reads the list of returned mail patients.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor, file viewer, or terminal output displaying the contents of '~/Documents/returned_mail_list.txt', which contains the names of the patients.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opens the MedinTux application to manage patients.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the MedinTux graphical user interface (specifically the patient management module) open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent updates the address for one of the patients on the list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a patient record from the text file open in MedinTux. The address text field must show 'NPAI' (e.g., 'NPAI - ') prepended to the beginning of the address.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent updates the address for a second patient on the list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a different patient record from the text file open in MedinTux, with 'NPAI' prepended to their address in the address field.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent updates the address for the third patient on the list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a third distinct patient record from the text file open in MedinTux, with 'NPAI' prepended to their address in the address field.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the MedinTux GUI to update the records.
integrity.visual_evidence: The address modifications should be visible within the MedinTux graphical interface text boxes. The agent should not bypass the UI by executing direct MySQL UPDATE queries in the terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the original address information was not deleted.
integrity.visual_evidence: The address field must still contain the original street address immediately following the 'NPAI' prefix. The field should not be replaced entirely by the 'NPAI' string.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not modify patients outside the provided list.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots showing the agent adding 'NPAI' to a patient who was not listed in the returned_mail_list.txt file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input file is located at /home/ga/Documents/returned_mail_list.txt and contains exactly 3 patients. The agent must use the MedinTux GUI to update the address field for these 3 specific patients by prepending 'NPAI' (e.g., 'NPAI - '). The original address must be preserved after the prefix. The agent must not modify any other patients in the database.
